codeReview.summary: Data clear functionality fully implemented. DELETE /api/settings/clear-data endpoint clears all user data (sessions, messages, psych_updates, semantic_assertions, profile, settings, user). Frontend UI provides confirmation dialog before deletion. Tests added for auth requirement and data deletion. All 369 tests pass.

summary: Feature implementation complete and correct. DELETE /api/settings/clear-data removes all user data in correct cascade order. Frontend UI includes confirmation dialog. Tests added for auth and clear functionality. All 369 tests pass. VAL-SETTINGS-004 assertion fulfilled.
